subject: Humanoid fighter in martial arts gi executing a powerful strike or energy move, close mid-shot
suspected_ip: Son Goku (Dragon Ball Z / Dragon Ball Super)
description: A male humanoid figure is depicted in a mid-shot combat stance, wearing what appears to be a martial arts gi. The figure is executing a powerful physical strike or energy move — the arm is extended forward in the direction of the attack. Energy or impact lighting intensifies around the contact point. The expression is focused and strained with exertion. The background is an energy-lit field that emphasizes the force of the movement. No weapon is present; this is a hand-strike or energy-technique attack.
foreground: fighter in gi with arm extended in powerful strike, energy at contact point
